tools.name: news_feed_search_news
tools.description: Search platform news index and return normalized list.

params.name: query
params.notes: If non-empty, enters similarity mode; tickers are not sent downstream.

params.name: coin
params.notes: Comma-separated tickers; only sent as downstream tickers when query is empty.

params.name: platform
params.notes: Preferred source platform filter, higher priority than platform_type.

params.name: platform_type
params.notes: Legacy platform mapping; ignored when platform exists; 'all' means omit.

params.name: lang
params.notes: MCP local filter only, not sent downstream.

params.name: time_range
params.notes: If present, overrides start_time/end_time.

params.name: start_time
params.notes: ISO8601 or Unix sec/ms supported.

params.name: end_time
params.notes: ISO8601 or Unix sec/ms supported; date-only end is treated as end-of-day.

params.name: top_total_score
params.notes: Effective value forced by mode: query non-empty -> 0; query empty -> default 1 unless explicitly 0.

logic: Resolve effective time window: time_range > (start_time,end_time); if both empty then default to last 7d.
Build GET request to real_time_news_feed-compatible endpoint with from/to Unix seconds, paging, and mode fields.
If query is empty and initial default-window result is empty, auto fallback once to 30d window.
Apply local post-filters: time window safety filter, optional lang filter, optional entity-based rerank for query mode.
Sort locally by time desc only when top_total_score=0 and sort_by=time.

errors.when: start_time/end_time cannot be parsed or start_time > end_time
API config missing

tools.name: news_feed_search_ugc
tools.description: Search social UGC by vector API or OpenSearch fallback path.

input_rules.required_policy: query or coin must be provided (at least one)

params.name: query
params.notes: If non-empty, uses vector API branch.

params.name: coin
params.notes: If query empty, coin is required to enter OpenSearch branch.

logic: Validation first: if both query and coin are empty, return invalid_param.
Branch A (query non-empty): call ugc_vector_data with normalized filters and time_start/time_end Unix seconds; local sort and trim by limit.
Branch B (query empty): use OpenSearch index query with filters/sort/time range mapping; requires opensearch client/index config.
Both branches map downstream items into unified spec field set.

errors.when: query and coin are both empty
API config missing for vector branch or OpenSearch unavailable for empty-query branch

tools.name: news_feed_search_x
tools.description: Search X/Twitter discussions with xAI primary path and optional platform fallback.

input_rules.required_policy: no hard required param, but empty query on xAI path returns empty result

params.name: query
params.notes: Topic text for X discussion search.

params.name: time_range
params.notes: Preferred recency window; when provided it overrides days.

params.name: days
params.notes: Backward-compatible fallback when time_range is not provided.

params.name: coin
params.notes: Only used in platform fallback path (mapped to search_news style).

params.name: platform
params.notes: Platform fallback only.

params.name: platform_type
params.notes: Platform fallback only.

params.name: lang
params.notes: Controls xAI answer language; also used by platform fallback MCP lang filter.

params.name: start_time
params.notes: Platform fallback only.

params.name: end_time
params.notes: Platform fallback only.

params.name: sort_by
params.notes: Platform fallback only.

params.name: top_total_score
params.notes: Platform fallback only.

params.name: limit
params.notes: Platform fallback only.

params.name: page
params.notes: Platform fallback only.

params.name: similarity_score
params.notes: Platform fallback only.

logic: Validation: allowed_handles and excluded_handles cannot both be non-empty.
If xAI key exists, run xAI Responses search_x flow with date window resolved from time_range (1h/24h->1d, 7d->7d); if time_range missing then use days.
If xAI key missing and platform fallback enabled, convert args to search_news-compatible args and call platform endpoint.
If xAI key missing and fallback disabled, return config_load_failed.
Always coerce sentiment fields in response to stable defaults.

errors.when: allowed_handles and excluded_handles are both provided
xAI key missing and fallback disabled, or core config unavailable

tools.name: news_feed_web_search
tools.description: Run open-web synthesis via xAI web_search with cited sources.
logic: Normalize mode/time_range/lang/limit, then call xAI ResponsesWebSearch API.
Parse structured output into summary/key_points/cited_sources and normalize citations.
If mode=brief, truncate summary to about 100 characters.
Return citations also as items list for generic clients.

errors.when: query is empty
xAI key or app config missing

tools.name: news_feed_get_exchange_announcements

params.name: exchange
params.notes: Used as platform fallback if platform is empty.

params.name: platform
params.notes: Wins over exchange for downstream platform param.

params.name: limit
params.notes: Only forwarded when >0.

params.name: from
params.notes: Unix sec lower bound; local post-filter also applied.

params.name: to
params.notes: Unix sec upper bound; local post-filter also applied.

logic: Build request to exchange_notice_sql endpoint with selected params.
platform param is resolved as platform > exchange priority.
Parse compatible list shapes (notice_list/news_list/items/list/data).
Apply local time filtering for from/to and sort by time desc.

errors.when: API config missing

tools.name: news_feed_get_social_sentiment
tools.description: Aggregate per-coin social sentiment from multiple downstream APIs.

params.name: time_range
params.notes: Invalid values are normalized to 24h.

logic: Normalize coin/time_range and convert to Unix start/end window.
Run 3 downstream calls in parallel: sentiment_score, positive_ratio, sentiment_analysis.
Compute overall_sentiment + normalized sentiment_label + mention_count + distribution + top_tweets.
top_tweets are parsed from sentiment_analysis response and returned in unified structure.

errors.when: API config missing

tools.name: news_events_get_latest_events
tools.description: Get latest event digest list from OpenSearch.

params.name: event_type
params.notes: all or empty means no type filter.

params.name: coin
params.notes: Comma-separated; expanded to variant terms for related_coins/symbols filtering.

params.name: time_range
params.notes: Mutually exclusive with start_time/end_time.

params.name: start_time
params.notes: Mutually exclusive with time_range.

params.name: end_time
params.notes: Mutually exclusive with time_range.

logic: Validate request: limit default 20, max 100; time_range enum check; time_range cannot coexist with start/end.
Build OpenSearch bool query with event_type/coin/time filters and sort by event time desc.
If no time params: use service policy (optional all-time mode or default 24h).
Map source docs to event list schema and return total/count/items.

errors.when: time_range invalid or mixed with start/end
limit > 100
OpenSearch query fails

tools.name: news_events_get_event_detail
tools.description: Get one event detail by event_id from OpenSearch.

params.name: event_id
params.notes: Cannot contain unsafe chars like quotes/semicolon/backslash.

logic: Validate event_id non-empty and safe format.
Query OpenSearch by configured id field and map result into detail response.
Return not-found style error if id has no hit.

errors.when: event_id empty, too long, or illegal characters
OpenSearch query fails

tools.name: news_prediction_get_volume_delta_ranking
tools.description: Daily venue/overall ranking by volume delta (UTC day). Optional filters: venue[], category, status; OpenSearch index must expose category/status fields for those filters to match.

params.name: date_utc
params.notes: Empty or omitted -> current UTC date.

params.name: limit
params.notes: OpenSearch size; values <=0 normalized to 20.

params.name: venue
params.notes: Each element must be allowed; empty or omitted -> no venue filter (all venues). Multiple values -> OpenSearch terms filter (exact).

params.name: category
params.notes: Optional category filter. Empty or omitted -> no category filter. Non-empty -> term filter on field category (exact). Index missing field or no matching docs -> empty overall, not an error.

params.name: status
params.notes: Empty or omitted -> treated as 'active' before query. 'all' -> no status filter. Otherwise term filter on field status (exact).

logic: Validate: limit in 1..100 after normalize (default 20); date_utc must be YYYY-MM-DD when set; each venue in whitelist; status must be empty (then default active) or allowed enum.

OpenSearch bool filter: term rank_type=volume_delta; range on part_date for the UTC calendar day; optional terms on venue; optional term on category when set and not 'all'; optional term on status when not 'all'.
Sort: volume_delta_usd_today desc, rank_no asc. Size = limit.
Map _source to RankingItem; event_name prefers event_name else market_title; market_name similar; parse excluded_reasons_json to excluded_reasons (invalid JSON -> []).

Response: overall = ordered hits; by_venue groups by venue (keys include polymarket, predict_fun); generated_at = max(calc_time) from hits else UTC now; duration_ms; partial/source_data_status/excluded_reasons aggregated per implementation.
Do not drop hits for null volume_delta_usd_today on this rank_type (all matching docs returned up to limit).

errors.when: date_utc not YYYY-MM-DD; venue not in whitelist; status not in allowed set when non-empty
limit > 100
OpenSearch query fails
opensearch.predictionRankIndex unset or prediction service not wired (placeholder tool)

tools.name: news_prediction_get_fastest_rising_ranking
tools.description: Daily venue/overall ranking by probability rise (UTC day). Optional filters: venue[], category, status; OpenSearch index must expose category/status fields for those filters to match.

params.name: date_utc
params.notes: Empty or omitted -> current UTC date.

params.name: limit
params.notes: OpenSearch size; values <=0 normalized to 20.

params.name: venue
params.notes: Each element must be allowed; empty or omitted -> no venue filter. Multiple values -> terms filter (exact).

params.name: category
params.notes: Same semantics as volume_delta tool: empty/omit -> no filter; non-empty -> term category.

params.name: status
params.notes: Same semantics as volume_delta tool: empty -> active; 'all' -> no status filter.

logic: Same validation and OpenSearch filter shape as volume_delta, except rank_type=fastest_rising.
Sort: probability_delta_today desc, rank_no asc. Size = limit.

Post-filter from result set: drop items where open_mid_probability_utc is null or probability_delta_today is null (not eligible for fastest_rising list); excluded_reasons from dropped rows may contribute to partial/excluded_reasons aggregation.
Map remaining docs to RankingItem; parse excluded_reasons_json as volume_delta tool.
Response shape same family as volume_delta (overall, by_venue, generated_at, duration_ms, partial, etc.).

errors.when: date_utc not YYYY-MM-DD; venue not in whitelist; status not in allowed set when non-empty
limit > 100
OpenSearch query fails
opensearch.predictionRankIndex unset or prediction service not wired (placeholder tool)
